name: mcp-llm-studio
description: Bridge MCP clients to a local LM Studio instance: model lifecycle, inference with reasoning & stats, SQLite chat, embeddings.
long_description: An MCP server that bridges Claude Desktop (and other MCP clients) to a locally-running LM Studio instance. Exposes seven tools: list/load/unload/download for model lifecycle, ask for single-turn inference with reasoning and per-request stats (tok/s, TTFT), chat for multi-turn conversations with SQLite-persisted history, and embed for text embeddings. Hybrid API surface: LM Studio's native REST API for lifecycle and reasoning, OpenAI-compatible API for multi-turn chat and embeddings.

tools.name: model_list
tools.description: List models currently loaded in LM Studio

tools.name: model_download
tools.description: Download a model from the LM Studio catalog or HuggingFace

tools.name: ask
tools.description: Single-turn inference with reasoning control and per-request stats

lm_studio_url.title: LM Studio URL
lm_studio_url.description: Base URL of your LM Studio REST server. Default is fine if LM Studio runs on the same machine.

lm_studio_api_key.title: LM Studio API Key (optional)
lm_studio_api_key.description: Only needed if LM Studio is configured with authentication. Leave empty otherwise.

sessions_db.title: Chat sessions database
sessions_db.description: Path to the SQLite file the chat tool uses to persist multi-turn history. Must live under a directory the server can create.
